src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and braces from the annotation interface definition.
Update LiquibaseProperties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
Explicitly exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to prevent conflicts or unwanted auto-configuration in newer Spring Boot versions.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to adhere to updated coding standards or conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable type inference.
Extract application name property into a dedicated variable for cleaner code structure.
Reformat Optional chain and string literals for improved readability.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut annotations for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat logger.error calls to use standard multiline argument listing style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved arguments of logger.error() to new lines with consistent indentation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevent potential NullPointerException when logging exception cause in production profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed e.getCause() to String.valueOf(e.getCause()) in the else branch of logAfterThrowing.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable initialization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties like async start behavior.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field, getter, and static inner class with asyncStart property.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Changed the logger field from a non-static instance variable to a static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
Replaced explicit type declaration with the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference, a feature available since Java 10.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed event.getMarker() check to event.getMarkerList() and added import java.util.List

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.

Update import for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
Remove unused GitProperties and BuildProperties fields and their associated setter methods.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private GitProperties gitProperties; private BuildProperties buildProperties;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with var keyword for local variable.
Reformat Ehcache configuration builder chain for better readability.
Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support conditional bean creation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace instance logger field with static final logger constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to allow runtime configuration of Liquibase startup behavior.
Make Liquibase asynchronous startup configurable via application properties instead of hardcoded.
Add null-safety checks and string conversion for Liquibase contexts to prevent issues with empty or null collections.
Add null-safety checks and string conversion for Liquibase label filters to prevent issues with empty or null collections.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for checking active Spring profiles.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson.core import with tools.jackson.core to migrate to the new Jackson distribution.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson.databind import with tools.jackson.databind to migrate to the new Jackson distribution.
Update method signature to throw JacksonException instead of JsonProcessingException to match the new library API.
